data.reasoning: Both models skipped the critical PKGBUILD file due to erroneous binary detection, preventing analysis of build/install behavior. No other files were reviewed.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD skipped despite being essential for AUR safety checks
No review of possible .install scripts or source files referenced in PKGBUILD
false_negatives: Potential risks in PKGBUILD (malicious commands, unsafe downloads)
Possible issues in install hooks or source files handling network/filesystem
re_audit_focus: PKGBUILD (validate file type, analyze build/install functions)
Any .install scripts or source files referenced in PKGBUILD
learnings: Fix binary detection: PKGBUILD should never be skipped as binary – implement text file validation
Prioritization failure: Models must always analyze PKGBUILD first before skipping other files
Improve error handling: Failed PKGBUILD review should trigger manual audit recommendation
Add fallback mechanism: Attempt force-reading critical files when binary detection fails
